studyName: NICHD Genomic and Proteomic Network for Preterm Birth Research (GPN)

variables.name: C01DIFF
variables.description: Difference (days) between EDC by LMP vs Ultrasound

variables.name: C01INCGA
variables.description: Delivery between 20 wks 0 days and 33 wks 6 days (inclusive) following spontaneous onset of labour and/or pPROM that is followed at any interval by the spontaneous onset of labour at < 34 weeks gestation

variables.name: C01INCGA2
variables.description: Gestational age at delivery estimated by and meeting criteria of Project gestational age

variables.name: C01INCGA3
variables.description: Delivery between 39 wks 0 days and 41 wks 6 days following spontaneous labour and/or  PROM (see definition 255) that is followed at any interval by the spontaneous onset of labour between 39 wks 0 days and 41 wks 6 days

variables.name: C01INCGA4
variables.description: Gestational age at delivery estimated by and meeting criteria of Project gestational age

variables.name: C01OTHER
variables.description: Is the participant participating in any other study or clinical trial?

variables.name: C01OTHERYES
variables.description: If yes for C01OTHER, name of study:

variables.name: C01PARTIC
variables.description: Willing to participate in the study?

variables.name: C01XANEU2
variables.description: Known aneuploidy or lethal fetal anomalies

variables.name: C01XIND
variables.description: Indicated delivery (for maternal or fetal indication)

variables.name: C01XIND2
variables.description: Indicated delivery (for medical or obstetrical complications not related to preterm labor)

variables.name: C01XPOLY
variables.description: Polyhydramnios (defined as Amniotic Fluid Index >/=25 cm or Deepest vertical Pocket >/=12 cm)

variables.name: C01XPOLY2
variables.description: Polyhydramnios (defined as Amniotic Fluid Index >=25 cm or Deepest Vertical Pocket >=12 cm)

variables.name: C01XPPROM
variables.description: PPROM that occurs at less than 34 weeks 0 days that is NOT followed by spontaneous labour?

variables.name: C01XPROM
variables.description: PROM that is not followed by the spontaneous onset of labour?

variables.name: C02ARTPREG
variables.description: Is the current pregnancy the result of assisted reproductive technology (ART)?

variables.name: C02DIET
variables.description: Was the patient following a special diet at the time she became pregnant?

variables.name: C02DIET2
variables.description: If yes for C02DIET, what diet?

variables.name: C02DIET3
variables.description: If other for C02DIET2, specify diet

variables.name: C02OTHART
variables.description: If other for C02TYPEART, specify type of ART

variables.name: C02OTHINS
variables.description: If other for C02INSU, please specify

variables.name: C02PRECARE
variables.description: Did the patient obtain prenatal care during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C02PROVIDE
variables.description: If yes for C02PRECARE, primary provider?

variables.name: C02TIME
variables.description: What time of day does the patient usually work?

variables.name: C02TYPEART
variables.description: If yes for C02ARTPREG, type of ART?

variables.name: C02WTGAIN
variables.description: Was the patient trying to gain weight when she became pregnant?

variables.name: C02WTLOSS
variables.description: Was the patient attempting to lose weight at the time she became pregnant?

variables.name: C02WTLOSS2
variables.description: Did she lose weight in the 3 months prior to becoming pregnant?

variables.name: C02WTLOSS3
variables.description: If yes, how much weight lost (lbs)?

variables.name: C03ALCUR
variables.description: Does the patient currently drink alcohol?

variables.name: C03ALEVER
variables.description: Has the patient ever consumed an alcoholic drink?

variables.name: C03ALPREG
variables.description: Has the patient consumed alcoholic drinks at any time during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C03ALWK
variables.description: If yes for C03ALCUR, number of drinks in the last week?

variables.name: C03DRGNM
variables.description: Drug name (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C03DRGNMOT
variables.description: If other for C03DRGNM, please specify drug (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C03DRGPREG
variables.description: Has the patient ever used street drugs at any time during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C03DRGUSE
variables.description: Time of drug use (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C03DRGWKUSE
variables.description: Number of times drug used /week? (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C03DRUGEV
variables.description: Has the patient ever used street drugs?

variables.name: C03MORE4
variables.description: During this pregnancy, how many times in one month has the patient consumed 4 or more drinks in one episode?

variables.name: C03NUMCIG
variables.description: If yes for C03CURSM, number of cigarettes per day in the last week?

variables.name: C03SMEVER
variables.description: Has the patient ever smoked cigarettes?

variables.name: C03SMPREG
variables.description: Has the patient smoked cigarettes at any time during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C04COUSIN
variables.description: Does the patient have any female first cousins?

variables.name: C04COUSPTB
variables.description: Have any of the first cousins experienced a preterm birth?

variables.name: C04MOMPTB
variables.description: Has the patient's mother experienced a preterm birth?

variables.name: C04SISPTB
variables.description: Have any of the sisters experienced a preterm birth?

variables.name: C04SISTERS
variables.description: Does the patient have any sisters?

variables.name: C05BRAND
variables.description: Brand or Generic Name of Drug (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C05CORT
variables.description: Has the patient used corticosteroids at any time during pregnancy (other than for acceleration of functional fetal maturity)?

variables.name: C05DOSE
variables.description: Dose of the medication (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C05FOLIC
variables.description: Is the patient currently taking folic acid supplements?

variables.name: C05FREQ1_20
variables.description: Other Frequency if C05FREQ2 is 8 (Other) (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C05FREQ2
variables.description: Frequency of the medication (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C05GENER
variables.description: Medication (Generic name) (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C05NEWMED
variables.description: Has the patient been prescribed any new medications since the patient's last study visit?

variables.name: C05PRENATV2
variables.description: If yes for C05PRENATV, did prenatal vitamin use begin before the current pregnancy?

variables.name: C05PROGEST
variables.description: Has the patient used Progesterone therapy prior to 14 weeks?

variables.name: C05REAS1_20
variables.description: Reason for taking the medication (Multiple drugs are split by "|")

variables.name: C08ADMITREAS1
variables.description: If yes for C08EADMIT, choose reasons for previous admission (multiple reasons are split by "|")

variables.name: C08ADMITREAS2
variables.description: Please specify other reason for admission, if C08ADMITREAS1 is other

variables.name: C08BABYMV
variables.description: In the last 24 hours, how does the patient describe the movement of her baby?

variables.name: C08COMP1
variables.description: Has the patient ever experienced any complications during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C08COMP2
variables.description: If yes for C08COMP1, choose complications experienced (multiple complications are split by "|")

variables.name: C08COMP3
variables.description: Please specify other complications experienced, if C08COMP2 is other

variables.name: C08CVMSUS
variables.description: Has the patient's cervix ever been measured by ultrasound?

variables.name: C08DIGIT
variables.description: Has the patient had a digital cervical exam?

variables.name: C08DILATE
variables.description: Result of digital cervical exam: cm dilated:

variables.name: C08EADMIT
variables.description: Has the patient ever been admitted to the hospital during this pregnancy prior to this admission?

variables.name: C08EFFACE
variables.description: Result of digital cervical exam: Effacement %

variables.name: C08HOSPREAS
variables.description: What was the primary reason(s) that the patient came to the hospital? (multiple reasons are split by "|")

variables.name: C08HOSPREAS2
variables.description: Please specify other primary reason that the patient came to the hospital:

variables.name: C08MORE4CON
variables.description: More than 4 contractions in 20 minute period?

variables.name: C08NEWMED1
variables.description: Has the patient been prescribed any new medications?

variables.name: C08NUMCONT
variables.description: In the past 2 weeks, how often has the patient experienced uterine contractions >/=6 contractions per hour?

variables.name: C08PROMEVAL
variables.description: Has the patient ever been evaluated for symptoms of PROM in the hospital or in the doctor's office during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C08PTL
variables.description: Has the patient ever been evaluated for symptoms of PRETERM LABOR in the hospital or in the doctor's office during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C08VFF
variables.description: Has the patient had a vaginal fetal fibronectin sample collected?

variables.name: C09ABX1
variables.description: Antibiotics used at any time during this hospitalization for delivery?

variables.name: C09ABX2
variables.description: If Yes for C09ABX1, choose which kind used

variables.name: C09ABX3
variables.description: Specify what other antibiotics were used

variables.name: C09ANTICON1
variables.description: Anticonvulsants used at any time during this hospitalization for delivery?

variables.name: C09ANTICON2
variables.description: If Yes for C09ANTICON1, choose which kind used

variables.name: C09CCROIDS1
variables.description: Corticosteroids used at any time during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C09CCROIDS2
variables.description: Specify which corticosteroid was used and the dose

variables.name: C09HTNMED1
variables.description: Antihypertensives used at any time during this hospitalization for delivery?

variables.name: C09HTNMED2
variables.description: If Yes for C09HTNMED1, choose which kind used

variables.name: C09HTNMED3
variables.description: Specify what other antihypertensives were used

variables.name: C09NARC1
variables.description: Narcotics or analgesics used at any time during this hospitalization for delivery?

variables.name: C09NARC2
variables.description: If yes for C09NARC1, choose which kind used (if multiple, split by "|")

variables.name: C09NARC3
variables.description: Specify what other narcotics or analgesics were used

variables.name: C09OTHSTUDY1
variables.description: Was patient enrolled in any other studies during this pregnancy?

variables.name: C09OTHSTUDY2
variables.description: If yes for C09OTHSTUDY1, specify study(ies)

variables.name: C09POSTCOMP1
variables.description: Post Partum Complications? (if multiple, split by "|")

variables.name: C09POSTCOMP2
variables.description: If yes for C09POSTCOMP1, which complications

variables.name: C09STILLOUT
variables.description: If the infant is not live born, code infant outcome

variables.name: C09TOCO1
variables.description: Tocolytics used at any time during this hospitalization for delivery?

variables.name: C09TOCO2
variables.description: If yes for C09TOCO1, choose tocolytics used from the list below (if multiple, split by "|")

variables.name: C10ABNORM
variables.description: Were there any Congenital or Chromosomal abnormalities?

variables.name: C10CRANICT
variables.description: Was a cranial sonogram or CT performed during this hospitalization?

variables.name: C10IVH
variables.description: If yes to cranial sonogram or CT, most severe grade IVH:

variables.name: C10NEOCOMP2
variables.description: Possible neonatal complications (if multiple, split by "|")

variables.name: C10NEOCOMP3
variables.description: If Other Neonatal Complications, please describe

variables.name: C10NEODTH1
variables.description: Did infant experience immediate neonatal death?

variables.name: C10NEODTH2
variables.description: What was the cause of neonatal death?

variables.name: C10PEDGA
variables.description: Pediatric assessment of Gestational Age  at delivery (wks)

variables.name: C10TRANS1
variables.description: Transferred from birth hospital NICU (if sent to chronic care choose 'NO')

variables.name: C10TRANS2
variables.description: Specify where baby was transferred to

variables.name: C11ANGER
variables.description: Part I: Been angered because of things that were outside your control?

variables.name: C11BFPREG
variables.description: Part IV: Thinking back, just before you became pregnant, which of the following best describes how you were feeling at the time?

variables.name: C11CONF
variables.description: Part I: Felt confident about your ability to handle your personal problems?

variables.name: C11CONTROL
variables.description: Part I: Felt that you were unable to control the important things in your life?

variables.name: C11COPE
variables.description: Part I: Found that you could not cope with all the things that you had to do?

variables.name: C11CTRL
variables.description: Part II: Fear of losing control

variables.name: C11DIFF
variables.description: Part I: Felt difficulties were piling up so high that you could not overcome them?

variables.name: C11FEAR
variables.description: Part II: Fear of worst happening

variables.name: C11HEART
variables.description: Part II: Heart pounding or racing

variables.name: C11IRRA
variables.description: Part I: Been able to control irritations in your life?

variables.name: C11LSWT
variables.description: Part III: 19a. I am purposely trying to lose weight

variables.name: C11PARTNER
variables.description: Part IV: Which of the following statements best describes your partner during the three months before you became pregnant?

variables.name: C11SWEAT
variables.description: Part II: Hot or cold sweats

variables.name: C11TOP
variables.description: Part I: Felt that you were on top of things?

variables.name: C11UPSET
variables.description: Part I: Been upset because of something that happened unexpectedly?

variables.name: C11URWAY
variables.description: Part I: Felt that things were going your way?

variables.name: C14OTHER
variables.description: Other Unanticipated SERIOUS Adverse Event   (provide brief explanation below)

variables.name: C14RELATE
variables.description: RELATIONSHIP OF ADVERSE EVENT TO STUDY: (CHECK ONE)

variables.name: PRETERMCESAR
variables.description: Reason for preterm fetal or maternal complications (If multiple, split by "|")

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: The analyte type of the sample

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: The body part from which the sample is collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: The tumor status of the sample
